errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.

freelancer.body: Independent activity based on special professional qualification or creative work. Examples: doctors, lawyers, tax advisors, architects, engineers, translators, journalists. Generally no Gewerbesteuer and no Gewerbeanmeldung. Registration at Finanzamt is required. Classification always depends on the actual activity.

tradeBusiness.body: Any permanent independent activity with profit intention that is neither a liberal profession nor agriculture/forestry. Generally requires Gewerbeanmeldung. Gewerbesteuer may apply. Further obligations may arise depending on size and structure, e.g. Handelsregister, IHK/HWK or commercial bookkeeping.

agriculture.nameLocal: Agriculture, forestry, horticulture, animal husbandry, fishing
agriculture.body: Special activity category with its own tax framework. Neither ordinary Gewerbe nor liberal profession. Special rules for taxation, accounting and authorities apply depending on the activity.

otherSelfEmployment.nameLocal: Special cases / other self-employment outside classical liberal professions
otherSelfEmployment.body: Certain activities qualify as self-employment for tax purposes without being typical liberal professions, e.g. certain asset management or separately regulated activities. Case-by-case review required.

soleProprietorship.body: Legal form for one person. No statutory minimum capital. Full personal liability. Either liberal profession or Gewerbe depending on activity.

registeredTrader.body: Sole proprietorship in Handelsregister. For commercial trading businesses. No statutory minimum capital. Full personal liability.

gbr.body: Legal form for at least two persons. No statutory minimum capital. Personal liability of all partners. Suitable for simple team start-ups and certain liberal profession associations.

partg.body: Special legal form for members of liberal professions. Registration in Partnerschaftsregister. Not a commercial enterprise. No statutory minimum capital.

partgMbb.body: For liberal professions with limited professional liability, where professional law permits. Registration in Partnerschaftsregister required.

ug.body: Capital company with low start-up capital. Liability generally limited to company assets. Notary and Handelsregister required. Statutory reserve obligation until reaching GmbH minimum share capital.

gmbh.body: Classic capital company. Statutory minimum share capital 25,000 EUR. Liability generally limited to company assets. Notary and Handelsregister required.

ag.body: Capital company for larger or more structured business models. Statutory minimum capital 50,000 EUR. Formal governing bodies and Handelsregister required.

ohg.body: Partnership for commercial enterprises. No statutory minimum capital. Full personal liability of all partners. Handelsregister required.

kg.body: Partnership with at least one fully liable general partner and at least one limited partner. No statutory minimum capital. Handelsregister required.

gmbhCoKg.nameLocal: Hybrid: KG with GmbH as general partner
gmbhCoKg.body: Special form of KG where the GmbH acts as the fully liable general partner. Combines KG structure with liability limitation through GmbH. Handelsregister required.

holding.body: Not a separate legal form, but a participation structure: one company holds shares in other companies. Possible e.g. with GmbH, UG or AG as the holding company.

incomeTax.body: Progressive rate. Basic tax-free allowance 2026: 12,348 EUR. Top rate 42%, the so-called Reichensteuer 45%.

corporateTax.body: Rate 15% on the taxable income of capital companies such as UG, GmbH and AG. Additionally, Solidaritätszuschlag is levied on Körperschaftsteuer. Distributions to natural persons are regularly subject to Kapitalertragsteuer.

tradeTax.body: Municipal tax for commercial enterprises. Assessment base: profit × 3.5%; multiplied by the municipal rate (Hebesatz). For sole traders and partnerships, a tax-free amount of 24,500 EUR applies. Liberal professions under § 18 EStG are generally not subject to Gewerbesteuer.

vat.body: Standard rate 19%, reduced rate 7%. The Kleinunternehmer scheme applies as of 2025 generally up to 25,000 EUR prior-year revenue and 100,000 EUR current revenue; if 100,000 EUR is exceeded, it ceases within the year.

capitalGainsTax.body: Generally 25% on dividends and certain capital income, plus Solidaritätszuschlag and where applicable Kirchensteuer.

payrollTax.body: Not a separate tax type, but the tax withholding on employment income within the framework of Einkommensteuer. The employer withholds it and transfers it to Finanzamt.

solidaritySurcharge.body: 5.5% of assessed Körperschaftsteuer and generally also of Kapitalertragsteuer. For Einkommensteuer, since 2021 it is only levied at higher tax burdens; the exemption threshold was further raised for 2026.

churchTax.body: 8% or 9% of Einkommensteuer depending on the federal state. Only for members subject to church tax.

propertyTax.body: Tax on domestic real property. Affects businesses with real estate or land. From 2025 Grundsteuer is based on the reformed valuation rules.

inheritanceGiftTax.body: Relevant upon gratuitous transfer of assets, including business assets. Tax reliefs may apply to business assets depending on conditions.

healthInsurance.body: Self-employed persons are required to have health insurance and choose between statutory (GKV) and private (PKV) health insurance depending on their situation. In the GKV the general contribution rate is 14.6% plus a fund-specific additional contribution; the average additional contribution for 2026 is 2.9%.

pensionInsurance.body: The contribution rate to statutory pension insurance in 2026 remains 18.6%. For employees, employers and employees generally each pay half. For self-employed persons, compulsory insurance applies only in certain professions; otherwise often voluntary or through occupational pension funds.

unemploymentInsurance.body: Contribution rate 2.6% of contributory earnings; employers and employees generally each pay half. For self-employed persons, voluntary continuation of insurance is possible under certain conditions.

careInsurance.body: Since 1 January 2025 the general contribution rate is 3.6%; for childless persons 4.2%. For employees, employers and employees generally each pay half of the basic contribution; the childless surcharge is borne by the employee alone.

accidentInsurance.body: Businesses must register with the responsible Berufsgenossenschaft. Which BG is responsible depends on the activity. Employees are generally covered by statutory accident insurance; special rules apply to business owners depending on the BG.

finanzamt.body: Responsible for tax registration, tax number, tax returns and ongoing taxation. Tax registration is generally done electronically via ELSTER.

gewerbeamt.body: Responsible for Gewerbeanmeldung. Liberal professions generally do not need a Gewerbeanmeldung. Fees and procedures vary by municipality.

handelsregister.body: Mandatory in particular for UG, GmbH, AG, OHG, KG and e.K. Registration is via notarized application to the registration court.

ihkHwk.body: Commercial businesses are regularly members of the Industrie- und Handelskammer or, for craft activities, the Handwerkskammer. Liberal professions generally do not belong to the IHK if there is no commercial activity. Contributions depend on legal form, profit and chamber.

elster.body: Official online portal of the tax administration for tax registration, returns and many applications.

bundesanzeiger.body: Certain companies, in particular capital companies, must electronically disclose or deposit annual financial statements.

steuernummer.body: Issued by Finanzamt and used for tax identification of the business or self-employed activity.

taxId.body: Personal, lifelong 11-digit identification number for natural persons.

vatId.body: Used for cross-border VAT transactions within the EU. In Germany begins with "DE".

companyNumber.body: Required as soon as employees are hired. Generally issued via the Betriebsnummern-Service of the Federal Employment Agency.

euer.body: Simplified profit determination for many liberal professions and businesses not required to keep accounts. Not for capital companies.

balanceSheet.body: Mandatory in particular for capital companies and commercial businesses with bookkeeping obligations. Includes ongoing accounting, annual accounts and balance sheet.

depreciation.body: Tax distribution of acquisition or production costs of a depreciable asset over its useful life.

inputVat.body: VAT that a business pays for input services and can claim from Finanzamt if entitled to input tax deduction.

smallBusinessScheme.body: No VAT charged under § 19 UStG. Since 2025 generally up to 25,000 EUR prior-year revenue and 100,000 EUR current revenue; if exceeded, the relief ends.

cashBasisVat.body: VAT generally arises only upon receipt of payment. Available for certain businesses on application.

accrualBasisVat.body: VAT generally arises at the end of the advance return period in which the supply was made. This is the standard case.

intraEuSupply.body: Supply to a business in another EU member state can be VAT-exempt if the statutory conditions are met, in particular a valid USt-IdNr. and supporting evidence.

oss.body: EU reporting procedure for certain cross-border B2C transactions. Relevant in particular for distance sales to EU consumers above the union-wide threshold.

managingDirector.body: Legal representative of a GmbH or UG. Manages the company externally and internally.

shareCapital.body: For GmbH 25,000 EUR. For UG there is no minimum share capital of 25,000 EUR; it can be founded with lower share capital.

articlesOfAssociation.body: Founding document of the company. For UG and GmbH must be notarially certified.

liquidation.body: Orderly winding-up procedure for dissolving a company. For capital companies generally involves formal register and publication steps.

incomeTaxReturn.body: Generally to be filed by 31 July of the following year. When prepared by tax advisors generally by the last day of February of the second following year; transitional rules apply for certain years.

tradeTaxReturn.body: Annual return for commercial businesses. General filing deadlines are governed by the Abgabenordnung.

vatAdvanceReturn.body: Electronically via ELSTER. Generally to be filed by the 10th day after the end of the advance return period; this period is monthly or quarterly depending on the tax burden.

annualStatements.body: Capital companies are required to prepare annual financial statements; disclosure or deposit in the Bundesanzeiger may be required.

fines.sectionSubtitle: Typical violations that entrepreneurs are fined for most often — with an explanation of the cause and the size of the penalties.
fines.disclaimer: ⚠️ This information is for guidance only. For specific questions, consult a Steuerberater or Rechtsanwalt.

noImprint.title: No Impressum
noImprint.description: Required: name, address, contact, commercial register entry.

dataPrivacy.title: Privacy / cookie violation
dataPrivacy.description: No cookie banner, Google Analytics without consent.

photosNoLicense.title: Photos without license (Getty, Shutterstock)
photosNoLicense.description: Images from Google or used without license. Warning letters from photo agencies.

tillNoTse.title: Cash register without TSE
tillNoTse.description: Cash data not stored correctly, no TSE module.

undeclaredWork.title: Undeclared work
undeclaredWork.description: Customs checks. Restaurants, construction, salons, delivery services.

cctvNoNotice.title: CCTV without notice
cctvNoNotice.description: Warning sign mandatory. No filming of the street or neighborhood.

advertisingNoPermit.title: Advertising without permit
advertisingNoPermit.description: Illuminated signs, banners, large signs often require a permit.

alcoholNoLicense.title: Alcohol without restaurant license
alcoholNoLicense.description: Gaststättenerlaubnis mandatory. Selling to minors is separately punishable.

outdoorSeating.title: Outdoor seating without permit
outdoorSeating.description: City permit mandatory. Too many tables, blocked walkways.

incorrectInvoices.title: Incorrect invoices
incorrectInvoices.amount: Client's input VAT deduction at risk
incorrectInvoices.description: Required details: addresses, date, invoice number, VAT rate, Steuernummer.

lateTaxReturn.title: Late tax return
lateTaxReturn.description: Late filing penalty. Deadline: 31 July, or 28 February of the following year with a Steuerberater.

gema.title: GEMA violation
gema.description: Music in restaurant, shop, salon: license mandatory. Spotify is for private use only.

noBgRegistration.title: Missing BG registration
noBgRegistration.description: BG registration mandatory within 1 week of founding.

restaurantVsTakeaway.title: Dine-in vs. takeaway
restaurantVsTakeaway.body: Restaurant 19%, takeaway 7%. Common: till set to 7% for everything → back taxes.

drinksAlways19.title: Drinks always 19%
drinksAlways19.body: Even if food is 7%: drinks are always 19%. Common mistake.

b2bEu.title: B2B within EU: 0% VAT
b2bEu.body: EU business with VAT number → 0% VAT. Verify VAT number and state it on the invoice.

b2cEu.title: B2C in EU: buyer country VAT
b2cEu.body: Over 10,000 EUR to EU consumers → buyer country VAT via OSS.

onlineCourses.title: Online courses and digital services
onlineCourses.body: VAT depends on the client's country. One of the most complex areas.

kleinunternehmerInvoice.title: Kleinunternehmer and VAT statement
kleinunternehmerInvoice.body: Kleinunternehmer cannot show 19% — otherwise VAT becomes due.

euPurchase.title: Purchase from another EU country
euPurchase.body: Intra-EU purchase: 0% on the supplier invoice, but you self-assess 19%.

carPrivateUse.title: Car: business and private use
carPrivateUse.body: Private use of the company car: VAT on the private share is mandatory.

vatIsStateMoney.title: VAT is state money
vatIsStateMoney.body: VAT is not your equity. Spent → back taxes + interest.

questionnaire.disclaimer: Important: This calculation is informative and not legal advice.

activity.title: Type of activity
activity.hint: Type your activity — the system will detect the category and Berufsgenossenschaft.

founders.title: Number of founders
founders.hint: Determines which legal forms are available.

liability.title: Limited liability preferred?
liability.hint: Affects the priority of the recommended legal form.

options.maybe: Preferable, but I want to compare all available options

city.title: Registration city
city.hint: City affects Gewerbesteuer. Enter the city name in German.

staffSalary.title: Average gross monthly salary (full-time)
staffSalary.hint: Average gross monthly salary per full-time employee.
